content:
GO-WITH-CONDITIONS: only if the nonce gloss templates are themselves matched so the *only* difference is animacy. Right now the animal-vs-mineral gloss introduces a semantic-class / naturalness cue beyond animacy, so a surface/semantic reader could still produce a spurious nonce-arm shift.

The fresh-item criterion for replication is fine on the possessor side: disjoint possessor lemmas + disjoint nonce strings is enough to avoid item reuse. Reusing the same possessum is not a cheatable confound by itself; it is the point of the held-fixed frame design. Same for the frozen parser / frame-level resampling.

Enlarging only the nonce arm is not a bias if it was pre-specified as targeting the known-weak leg and the typical arm is unchanged; it just changes precision, not the yardstick, assuming the decision rule doesn’t reweight arms post hoc.

But I do not buy “covariate weak, so confirm rests on nonce arm” as fully clean unless you can rule out the gloss-template semantics. The animal/mineral wording is not a pure animacy manipulator; it can shift plausibility, concreteness, and taxonomic typicality. That is a residual cheat surface for a nonce-only effect.

VOTE: GO-WITH-CONDITIONS
